rent.note: furnished 1BR city centre; avg £827 (~$1,040); comfortable budget €650–€850

utilities.note: electric + heating + water + internet; avg £183/mo for 85m2

diningOut.note: Old Town restaurants and cafes; tourist premium

coworking.note: hot-desk at The Spot or Connect avg €262/mo; higher end for Slovakia

simData.note: Slovak SIM; Orange or Telekom; reasonable rates

accomSeasonality._doc: 12 monthly multipliers for RENT ONLY (Jan..Dec). 1.0 = base. Central European capital; moderate peak.

evidence.quote: Renting a 1-bedroom apartment in the city centre costs an additional £827 on average. Comfortable Tier: Budget $1,680–$1,880 for a central apartment, regular dining out, and a dedicated coworking membership

evidence.claim: coworking hot-desk avg €262/mo at The Spot or Connect
evidence.quote: A hot desk at popular spots like The Spot or Connect averages €262 per month

evidence.claim: utilities avg £183/mo for 85m2; total expat spend €1,250–€1,800/mo
evidence.quote: the cost of living in Bratislava, Slovakia for an expat in 2026 averages €1,250–€1,800 per month for total. Basic utilities average £183 per month

evidence.claim: budget tier $1,430–$1,530; Bratislava pricier within Slovakia
evidence.quote: Budget Tier: Expect to spend $1,430–$1,530 inclusive of rent
